title: Super Easy Graphene
description: You can buy my book  Graphene 101 An Inventors guide to making graphene at https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/304668 - or materials for your own experiments from the webshop at www.workingink.co.uk. the money will help my research. thanks. This was inspired from the article 'Interlayer catalytic exfoliation realizing scalable production of large-size pristine few-layer graphene' that was pointed out to me by a friend of mine and is easily available as a download from the net if you want to check it out. Much easier than all that tedious mucking about with graphene oxide! And more in line with how i have been thinking about graphene production of late. I am also reminded quite strongly of Petrik and his magic compound. By the way - the glass gets hot!
